## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `yarn check` passes locally.
- [ ] Relevant behaviour was tested manually.
- [ ] UI changes include an updated screenshot where useful.
- [ ] Security, privacy, updater, and compatibility effects were considered.
- [ ] Documentation and release notes were updated when required.

## Compatibility

List the platforms and integrations tested, or explain why they are unaffected.
